title: Ubiquiti UACC-Adapter-AC-210W power adapter 54V
description: The Ubiquiti UACC-Adapter-AC-210W is a power adapter for connection to a 230V electrical network, designed not only for powering UniFi PoE switches but also other devices requiring an input voltage of 54V DC with a power output of up to 210W .16AWG DC output cable is 150 cm long and terminated with a 5.5 x 2.1 mm DC connector 54V DC / 3.9A Power Adapter 230V Power Cable Wall Mount Bracket (2) Screws and Wall Plugs
specsSearch: Power Power [W] 210 Output Voltage [V] 54 Output Current [A] 3,9
